items.name: Iron Coolus Helmet
items.description:
Simple. Reliable. Deadly. The Coolus helm was favored by swift-moving warriors who valued speed and precision in battle. Its smooth, rounded design offered protection without slowing the fighter, making it perfect for those who strike fast and disappear just as quickly.

Light on the head, heavy in purpose — fight with speed, fight with intent..
items.searchText:
iron coolus helmet simple. reliable. deadly. the coolus helm was favored by swift-moving warriors who valued speed and precision in battle. its smooth, rounded design offered protection without slowing the fighter, making it perfect for those who strike fast and disappear just as quickly.

light on the head, heavy in purpose — fight with speed, fight with intent.. gaul ᅠ ᅠ accessories hats casual military simple
